context: Tests whether the agent adds complete and correct YARD documentation to a Ruby service class, including class-level summaries, @param, @option tags for hash arguments, @return shapes, @raise for raised exceptions, and English-only text.

checklist.name: Class-level summary
checklist.description: The Billing::SubscriptionBillingService class has a one-line YARD summary comment directly above the class definition

checklist.name: self.call @param
checklist.description: self.call has a @param tag documenting the params argument with its type (e.g. [Hash])

checklist.name: @option for hash keys
checklist.description: self.call uses @option tags (not just @param) to enumerate the valid hash keys: at minimum :plan, :customer_id, and :action

checklist.name: self.call @return
checklist.description: self.call has a @return tag documenting the return shape (Hash with :success and :response keys)

checklist.name: @raise for InvalidPlanError
checklist.description: self.call or call documents @raise [Billing::InvalidPlanError] (or InvalidPlanError) as a possible exception

checklist.name: @raise for PaymentGatewayError
checklist.description: self.call or call documents @raise [Billing::PaymentGatewayError] (or PaymentGatewayError) as a possible exception

checklist.name: supported_plans @return
checklist.description: self.supported_plans has a @return tag documenting its return type (e.g. [Array<String>])

checklist.name: English only
checklist.description: All YARD comment text (summaries, descriptions, tag descriptions) is written in English — no other language used

checklist.name: No logic changes
checklist.description: The Ruby implementation logic is unchanged — only YARD comments were added (the method bodies remain identical to the input)

checklist.name: initialize documented
checklist.description: The initialize method has at least a @param tag for the params argument

checklist.name: @example present
checklist.description: At least one public method (self.call recommended) has a @example tag showing sample usage
